Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I grouped the raw system log events into coherent process cases based on application context and workflow continuity

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Each Case ID represents a single work session or task sequence where the user interacts with related documents or applications

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 001 encompasses all events from 0902 onward where the user shifts from Word to Chrome to handle an email then to Adobe Acrobat to review a report then to Excel to update a budget returns to Word to insert a reference and finally focuses on and edits the main report before closing everything

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Raw actions like TYPING SAVE CLICK and SWITCH were translated into higher level standardized activities

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities are named based on intent and context for example TYPING in Chrome with email context becomes Type Reply

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Temporal continuity and application focus guided case boundaries events separated by significant context switches from Word to Chrome are grouped only if they form a logical sequence otherwise new cases may begin

Name: Validation - NE
Text: This event log enables process mining tools to analyze the sequence of user actions identify bottlenecks and optimize workflow efficiency
